serviceNotes.engine oil: M47 2.0L diesel; fixed-interval EU oil ~15,000 km typical.
serviceNotes.fuel filter: Diesel fuel filter ~60,000 km typical EU interval.
serviceNotes.EGR / intake clean: Diesel EGR and intake soot. Cleaning around ~120,000 km when flow is restricted.

serviceSources.engine oil: BMW owner's manual E46 diesel — Oil Service; 15,000 km reflects common EU fixed diesel schedule. Tier 2: https://www.auto-abc.eu/BMW-3-serija/v2167-2001/service lists 10,000 km / 12 months for compiled 320d (M47) — verify printed maintenance table / market
serviceSources.micro filter: BMW owner's manual E46 — cabin microfilter on Inspection II cadence (~30,000 km typical EU spacing)
serviceSources.brake fluid: BMW owner's manual E46 — brake fluid every 24 months (DOT 4 LV)
serviceSources.air cleaner element: BMW owner's manual E46 — diesel air filter at major inspection cadence (~30,000 km typical). Tier 2: https://www.auto-abc.eu/BMW-3-serija/v2167-2001/service lists 10,000 km for compiled 320d — confirm booklet (may reflect severe-duty or database aggregation)
serviceSources.fuel filter: BMW owner's manual E46 diesel — file 60,000 km per common EU BMW diesel fuel-filter spacing. Tier 2: https://www.auto-abc.eu/BMW-3-serija/v2167-2001/service lists 20,000 km for 320d — discrepancy; verify OEM table for your production date / market
serviceSources.check front brake pads: BMW owner's manual E46 — brake inspection with regular service visits (~15,000 km oil-service cadence)
serviceSources.check rear brake pads: BMW owner's manual E46 — brake inspection with regular service visits (~15,000 km oil-service cadence)
serviceSources.vehicle check: BMW owner's manual E46 — Inspection I/II vehicle check (~60,000 km typical EU major-inspection spacing)
serviceSources.automatic transmission fluid: ZF/BMW specialist consensus; ATF often labelled lifetime — preventive change per independent recommendation
serviceSources.manual gearbox fluid: BMW owner's manual does not state a routine manual gearbox oil interval — preventive specialist interval
serviceSources.coolant flush: BMW owner's manual E46 specifies coolant change by model; file value preventive — confirm booklet
serviceSources.EGR / intake clean: Diesel specialist consensus (soot/EGR fouling); not a fixed BMW MFR interval in consumer schedule
